_comment: NPC: Priestess Yun (云祭司). INFERRED — Great Wang Capital inhabitant. Canon ID: INF-GWC-03. Per Article II (Reality First): the Zhao Country capital must have inhabitants. These NPCs are inferred from the city's district structure (governor mansion, temple, market, tavern, port). Prime Directive: these beings exist independently of the player's perception.
name: Priestess Yun
personality: serene, compassionate, spiritually devoted; offers counsel to those who seek it
relationship_to_wanglin: INFERRED — benevolent; would offer guidance to any cultivator who seeks it

perception_tiers.foundation: Priestess Yun — Qi Condensation 6 (mid-stage). INFERRED capital resident.
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Priestess Yun — minor figure in the capital's power structure

note: INFERRED from Great Wang Capital district structure. serene, compassionate, spiritually devoted; offers counsel to those who seek it

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi.

initiation_lines: Welcome, traveler. The temple district offers solace from the capital's noise. Light incense if you wish — the ancestors listen to those who are sincere.
Cultivation is not merely about power. It is about understanding. The temple preserves ancient teachings that even the sects have forgotten.
Many come to the capital seeking wealth or power. Few come seeking peace. I appreciate your visit. Stay as long as you like.
The offerings here are modest, but the ancestors do not judge by gold. They judge by the heart. Bring wheat for the poor, and the temple will bless your journey.

sect_tasks.description: Priestess Yun smiles gently: 'The temple needs offerings for the ancestral shrine. Gold nuggets for the altar, wheat for the poor. The ancestors will remember your generosity.'
Priestess Yun bows: 'We are running low on incense materials. Coal for the braziers, paper for prayer slips. The temple's peace depends on these humble supplies.'
